ddls:
CREATE TABLE "quotes" (
  "quote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quote */,
  "photo_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the photo associated with the quote */,
  "body" TEXT /* Text of the quote */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who created the quote */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the quote */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Relevant keywords or tags associated with the quote */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the quote is active or not */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the quote is featured or not */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the quote was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the quote was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quotes_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quotes_photo_id FOREIGN KEY ("photo_id") REFERENCES photos ("photo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the author */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the author */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Death date of the author */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the author */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Notable awards received by the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, moderator, user) */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the user's email is verified or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like event */,
  "quote_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quote being liked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who liked the quote */,
  "liked_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the quote was liked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_quote_id FOREIGN KEY ("quote_id") REFERENCES quotes ("quote_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "quote_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quote being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who commented on the quote */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for threaded comments) */,
  "comment_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the comment by other users */,
  "commented_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_quote_id FOREIGN KEY ("quote_id") REFERENCES quotes ("quote_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each share event */,
  "quote_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quote being shared */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who shared the quote */,
  "share_medium" TEXT /* Medium through which the quote was shared (e.g., Facebook, Twitter) */,
  "shared_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the quote was shared */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shares_quote_id FOREIGN KEY ("quote_id") REFERENCES quotes ("quote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shares_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "photos" (
  "photo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each photo */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the photo */,
  "caption" TEXT /* Caption for the photo */,
  "photo_tags" TEXT /* Relevant keywords or tags associated with the photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("photo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quote_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quote_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES quote_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quote_category_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "quote_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quote being mapped */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category being mapped to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quote_category_mapping_quote_id FOREIGN KEY ("quote_id") REFERENCES quotes ("quote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quote_category_mapping_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES quote_categories ("category_id")
)
